title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMWaterway
description: A waterway from OpenStreetMap tagged with waterway=*. Describes rivers, streams, canals, drains, and other water courses

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMWaterway

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification

waterwayType.description: Property. The OSM waterway tag classifying the water course. Enum:'river, stream, canal, drain, ditch, wadi, fairway, dock, dam, weir, waterfall...'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:waterway'

intermittent.description: Property. Indicates if the waterway only flows during certain times (e.g. wet season). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:intermittent'

widthMeters.description: Property. Width of the waterway in metres. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:width'

boat.description: Property. Navigation rules for boats on this waterway. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:boat'

oneway.description: Property. Indicates if water traffic is restricted to the direction of the drawn way. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:oneway'

salt.description: Property. Indicates if the water is saline. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:salt'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources
